# Florida Impact Shield - LLM Reference
# https://floridaimpactshield.com
# Updated: 2026-06-19

## Company
Florida Impact Shield is Florida's premier hurricane impact window and door installation company.
Licensed CBC contractor (CBC1265XXX). My Safe Florida Home approved. HVHZ certified.
Phone: (888) 975-4440
Email: info@floridaimpactshield.com

## Services
- Hurricane impact windows and doors
- My Safe Florida Home grant assistance (up to $10,000)
- Wind mitigation inspections
- 0% financing for 60 months
- Insurance savings up to 45%

## Grant Pages
- /pages/my-safe-florida-home-grants.html - Main grant guide
- /pages/my-safe-florida-home-miami-dade.html - Miami-Dade grant
- /pages/my-safe-florida-home-broward.html - Broward grant
- /pages/my-safe-florida-home-orlando.html - Orlando grant
- /pages/my-safe-florida-home-waiting-list.html - Waiting list help
- /pages/10000-impact-window-grant.html - $10,000 grant guide
- /pages/impact-windows-grant-florida-homeowners.html - Homeowners grant guide
- /pages/my-safe-florida-home-grant-impact-windows.html - Grant impact windows
- /pages/impact-window-grant-florida-2026.html - 2026 grant guide
- /pages/florida-hurricane-hardening-grant.html - Hurricane hardening grant

## Service Areas
Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Lee, Collier, Hillsborough, Pinellas, Sarasota, Orange, and all Florida counties.

## Key Facts
- Insurance savings: 25-45% on windstorm premium
- MSFH grant: up to $10,000 matching funds
- Wind resistance: 200+ mph
- Rating: 4.9/5.0 from 312+ reviews
- Financing: 0% for 60 months
- Service area: All 67 Florida counties
